task_description: Expand the Music Search & Discovery application by integrating multiple public music APIs (Spotify, Last.fm, Lyrics.ovh, YouTube, Color Thief) to provide a richer, more complete music discovery experience. Create a unified data layer that aggregates information from multiple providers into a single cohesive interface.

verification.summary: npm run lint passes (0 errors, 2 pre-existing warnings in SearchFilters.tsx). npm run build succeeds with all routes correctly compiled. No test framework installed (no tests to run). No Dockerfile present.

fixes_applied: Issue 1: Fixed Spotify token race condition with in-flight promise pattern
Issue 2: Added 200-char query length validation to all API proxy routes
Issue 3: Replaced Math.random() with deterministic skeleton widths array
Issue 4: Added 3-character minimum threshold for Spotify autocomplete calls
Issue 5: Added code comment acknowledging YouTube API key URL exposure (no fix possible)
Issue 6: Updated discover page footer to 'Powered by iTunes, Spotify, Last.fm & more'
